description_long: This is a stylized, cylindrical barrel with a muted olive-green body and metallic yellow bands at the top and bottom, each secured with visible screw heads. The top is flat and features a central, vertical protrusion resembling a plug or spout, while the opposite side of the lid has an integrated handle for lifting. One side of the barrel displays a prominent decorative emblem: a gold, crown-like motif with a keyhole at its center, suggesting a secure or special-purpose container. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, with hand-painted shading and outlines that give it a cartoonish or game-like appearance. The barrel sits on a square, flat yellow base, which may be part of its design or a display stand. The overall construction suggests it is hollow and could be used to store or transport items, possibly in a fantasy or urban adventure setting.
description: A stylized olive-green barrel with yellow metallic bands, a flat lid featuring a handle and spout, and a decorative keyhole emblem on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a central spout and the plain side of the barrel with visible banding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the integrated handle on the lid and the metallic banding, with no emblem visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the spout and plain banded surface, with the emblem not visible.
description_view_3: View showing the decorative gold keyhole emblem on the barrel's side and the handle on the lid.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metallic bands at top and bottom
